title: S80 3LJ, Steetley Dolomite Limited: environmental permit draft decision advertisement – EPR/BL3269IH/V009
body: "Details of the application  The Environment Agency has received a substantial variation application for an environmental permit under the Environmental Permitting (England and Wales) Regulations 2016. It is now consulting on the proposed decision.  Applicant name  Steetley Dolomite Limited  Reference number  EPR/BL3269IH/V009  Brief description of activity  This is a draft decision of a substantial variation that contains a time-limited derogation (in accordance with article 15(4) of IED).  The Derogation relates to:  BATc47 – Sulphur dioxide emissions from flue-gases of kiln firing  BATc51 – HCI (and HF) emissions from flue-gases of kiln firing  BATc53 – Group III metal emissions from flue-gases of kiln firing  The Derogation will expire on 31st December 2024  A brief explanation of the derogation is included in the Annex to the conditions of this permit.  Application type  Substantial variation  Regulated facility address   Whitwell Quarry Lime WorksSouthfield LaneWhitwellWorksopNottinghamshireS80 3LJ   Local authority  Bolsover  Information placed in Citizen Space for consultation:    Draft decision permit   Draft decision document    How to view and comment on the application End date for representations: 13/12/2024.  You can comment:  Online: view and comment on the proposed decision using Citizen Space  Via email: pscpublicresponse@environment-agency.gov.uk  For advice about how to make a representation or if you are unable to make a representation via e-mail please call 03708 506 506.  The Environment Agency will normally put any comments it receives on the public register. This includes your name but not your personal contact details. Please tell us if you do not want your response to be public.  The privacy notice for permit applicants/operators can be viewed at Privacy Notice  Find out more about consultations on draft decisions for environmental permits "
